title: From Boeing Starliner to Goodyear Tesla tire, 3-D printing is becoming manufacturing reality
text: Goodyear is making airless tires through 3-D printing, one example of additive manufacturing's rise among industrials from Boeing to Cummins.

title: Cummins collaborates with company pioneering energy storage technology to advance Destination Zero strategy
text: COLUMBUS, Ind.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, Cummins Inc. (NYSE: CMI), a global power technology leader announces an investment of $24M into VoltStorage, a leading technology company producing energy storage systems based on environmentally friendly redox flow technology. “Cummins is committed to developing a range of solutions that will enable our customers' success as we advance our Destination Zero strategy and decarbonize our diverse markets,” said Jennifer Rumsey, President and COO, Cummins Inc

title: 3 Auto Stocks Poised to Exceed Q2 Earnings Expectations
text: Despite the multiple headwinds that the auto space is battling with, industry participants like CMI, ALSN and RIVN look poised to deliver Q2 earnings beat according to our proprietary model.

title: AM Best Affirms Credit Ratings of China Merchants Insurance Company Limited
text: HONG KONG–(BUSINESS WIRE)–AM Best has affirmed the Financial Strength Rating of A- (Excellent) and the Long-Term Issuer Credit Rating of “a-” (Excellent) of China Merchants Insurance Company Limited (CMI) (Hong Kong). The outlook of these Credit Ratings (ratings) is stable. The ratings reflect CMI’s balance sheet strength, which AM Best assesses as very strong, as […]...

title: AGCO Announces Chief Supply Chain Officer Succession
text: DULUTH, Ga.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #AGCOIR--AGCO, Your Agriculture Company (NYSE: AGCO), a worldwide manufacturer and distributor of agricultural equipment, infrastructure and precision ag technology, announced today that its Board of Directors has appointed Tim Millwood to succeed Hans-Bernd Veltmaat as Senior Vice President and Chief Supply Chain Officer effective August 15, 2022. Mr. Millwood joins AGCO following a more than thirty-year career at Cummins Inc (NYSE: CMI), a global power technology leader,

title: Morgan Stanley and 2 Other Companies Raised Their Dividends This Week
text: Banking giant Morgan Stanley lifted its quarterly dividend by 11%, and Clorox, a maker of household products, edged up its quarterly dividend by 2%.

title: Cummins names Jennifer Rumsey as CEO to succeed Tom Linebarger
text: Jennifer Rumsey will succeed Tom Linebarger as CEO of Cummins Inc. next month. She is the first female and only the seventh CEO in the engine maker and power distribution company's 103-year history.

title: Cummins Promotes Jennifer Rumsey To CEO As Diesel Giant Seeks Cleantech Overhaul
text: She succeeds long-time chief Tom Linebarger as the largest maker of diesel engines for trucks and heavy-duty vehicles looks to become a major player in electric and hydrogen-fueled commercial vehicles.

title: Diesel Giant Cummins Names New CEO
text: Jennifer Rumsey, Cummins' president and chief operating officer since 2021, will be the first woman to lead the company in its long history.

title: Jennifer Rumsey Promoted to President and CEO of Cummins
text: --(BUSINESS WIRE)--Cummins Inc.: WHAT:   News conference announcing incoming CEO, Jennifer Rumsey as Cummins' seventh CEO, effective August 1.       WHO:   Tom Linebarger, Cummins Chairman and Chief Executive Officer     Jennifer Rumsey, Cummins President and COO       WHEN:   Thursday, July 14, 2022 at 1 p.m. – 1:45 p.m.       WHERE:   Cummins global headquarters (Columbus Office Building) 5th and Jackson St. Columbus, Indiana Zoom is also available: Phone:   US: +16465189805,,98722568218#,,,,

title: Cummins Elects Gary Belske to its Board of Directors
text: COLUMBUS, Ind.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, Cummins Inc. (NYSE: CMI) announced the election of Gary Belske to its Board of Directors. “I am thrilled to add Gary to our Board of Directors,” said Tom Linebarger, Chairman and CEO, Cummins Inc. “Gary will enhance the strength of our board with his leadership experience, knowledge of a broad range of industries, and deep expertise in financial reporting that can augment the rigor and transparency of our financial processes.” Belske had a 38-year career

title: Analyzing Cummins' Dividend Growth Potential
text: Cummins Inc. (CMI) is the featured stock from June's Dividend Growth Stocks Model Portfolio and offers excellent risk/reward.

title: A Look At Cummins Before The Upcoming Dividend Hike
text: Cummins will report its annual dividend hike during July, hiking 7.4% in 2021. Management expects revenue will have grown from FY2021 $24 billion to above $40 billion by the end of this decade.

title: Cummins Is An Attractive Dividend Growth Investment
text: Cummins is a reliable dividend payer in the past decades. Shares of Cummins are attractively valued at the moment.

title: Cummins: Tough Times Create Opportunity
text: The trucking industry has been worried about skyrocketing diesel prices throughout much of 2022. They have warned about possible supply chain disruptions and have indicated they are shipping loads at losses if they can pass along fuel surcharges.
